title: chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. sibiricum
intro: Chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. sibiricum, also known as Golden Saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Saxifragaceae. The medicinal properties of Golden Saxifrage include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Golden Saxifrage is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
